templates.name: Does the True lemon strawberry lemonade contain any traces of grapefruit or grapefruit juice?
templates.content: All of our non-GMO natural flavors contain ingredients from fruits, herbs, or vegetables depending upon the products. We do use grapefruit in product(s) and cannot guarantee there will be no cross-contamination.

templates.name: Damaged/broken/missing item - brand specific
templates.content: Can you please send me a photo of the item/s that you received along with your order number and email address? If you purchased from one of our retailers please send me your order confirmation as well.

templates.name: How many pounds is the box of 500 lemon packets?
templates.content: The box weighs 1.95 lbs.

templates.name: Can I use True Lemon in place of fresh lemon or bottled lemon juice?
templates.content:
True Lemon is a great alternative to fresh lemon juice or bottled lemon juice and can be used for cooking, baking, and seasoning. In the vast majority of recipes, where you want just the lemon taste - you can add True Lemon directly into the other ingredients. (Generally, we recommend 2 to 3 sachets = 1 tablespoon lemon juice.) However, in some recipes, it may be necessary or desirable to add an equivalent amount of water to replace the moisture the lemon, lime, orange, or grapefruit juice provides. In these cases, add both the appropriate number of True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, or True Grapefruit packets and the necessary amount of water. 

You can find the measuring equivalents and conversions here: https://www.truelemon.com/pages/measuring-equivalents

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/truelemon/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/TheTrueLemon/

templates.name: Can I use True Lemon, True Lime or True Orange in place of zest in a recipe?
templates.content: If you are using the zest of a lemon, lime, or orange for decorative purposes then you'll need to use a fresh lemon, lime, orange, or grapefruit. However, if you are using zest as an ingredient, you can use True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, or True Grapefruit. The equivalent is 2 sachets for 1 tablespoon of zest. (If you want a stronger citrus taste, you can add an additional sachet.)

templates.name: Do you use Erythritol in your products?
templates.content: Please be assured that we do not use erythritol in any of our products. Instead, we either use stevia and cane sugar (1g for our Lemonades/Limeades/Iced Teas and 2g for our Kids) or just Stevia (in our Energys).

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our ambassador program here: https://truecitrus.grin.live/brand-ambassador

templates.name: Can True Lemon be used to make jams or jellies that need the lemon for the added pectin to jell?
templates.content: Yes, we've heard from customers who use True Lemon as part of their jelly-making process.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-866-885-3666 (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-5:00pm EST) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customercare@truecitrus.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give your friends 40% off their first order and you'll get a 40% off coupon code for each new referral when they use your link. Check it out here - https://www.truelemon.com/pages/refer

templates.name: Can True Lemon be used in place of real lemon when canning/preserving?
templates.content: Yes, many people use True Lemon when canning or preserving.

templates.name: Where do I store your products?
templates.content: Many of our customers keep our products out on the counter, in their cabinets, or in their purse so they are always within easy reach. We also sell a table-top caddy and on-the-go mini-tote packet holder: https://www.truelemon.com/collections/accessories Our products should not be exposed to high temperatures for extended periods of time.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.truelemon.com/pages/find-in-store

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.truelemon.com/pages/faqs#shipping

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customercare@truecitrus.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How many calories does a packet have?
templates.content:
A packet of True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, or True Grapefruit has 0 calories. A serving of our beverage mixes contains 10 calories per serving. True Lemon Energy contains 0 calories per serving.

Our True Lemon Shaker, True Lime Shaker, True Lemon Pepper Spice Blend, True Lime Garlic & Cilantro Spice Blend, and True Orange Ginger Spice Blend contain 0 calories per serving.

templates.name: I'm allergic to corn, can I use your products?
templates.content: If you have a strong allergy to corn then we don't recommend using our products.  We always recommend speaking to your healthcare provider if you have questions or concerns.

templates.name: Are your products gluten free?
templates.content: All of our products are gluten-free and, in fact, many support groups for those with Celiac disease use our products regularly.

templates.name: If you use stevia in your drink mixes, why do you use sugar too?
templates.content: The sweetness in our drink mixes comes from stevia. The sugar we use is to help round out the notes of the stevia as well as act as a natural bulking agent.

templates.name: What are the phosphorous and potassium content levels in your products?
templates.content: Our products have 0 phosphorus and 0.01 milligrams of potassium (basically 0 grams).

templates.name: Do you have gift cards?
templates.content: At this time we do not have gift cards.

templates.name: How many carbs does a packet have?
templates.content:
A single serving (one packet) of True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, and True Grapefruit contains less than 1 gram of carbohydrates per packet. A stick packet of one of our naturally sweetened, 10-calorie Lemonades, Limeades, and Iced Teas contain 1g sugar and 3 grams of carbohydrates per stick packet.

A stick packet of one of our Energy products contain 0g sugar and less than 1g of carbohydrates.

templates.name: Is True Lemon considered an anti-oxidant?
templates.content: No, True Lemon is not considered an anti-oxidant.

templates.name: Are your products paleo and Keto friendly?
templates.content:
All of our products are very low carb and, thus, are perfect fits for a Paleo or Keto diet, especially our unsweetened Crystallized Wedge sachets, citrus Shakers, and Spice Blends. Our low-calorie, low-sugar, stevia-sweetened Lemonades, Limeades, Orangeades, and Iced Teas may be more of a question. Our Energy drinks have 0 calories, 0g sugars and less than 1g carb.

However, we encourage everyone to read our nutrition panels on every product page and make a judgment for themselves.

templates.name: Are your products organic?
templates.content: Our products are made with simple and clean ingredients and are non-GMO but are not organic.

templates.name: Does True Grapefruit offer any metabolism/weight loss benefits?
templates.content: True Grapefruit is made with grapefruit oils and juices but we don't make any specific claims about its impact on your metabolism. Drinking water with any True Citrus product instead of soda or other sweetened beverages can help you lose weight.

templates.name: What is the quantity of electrolytes per serving in your products?
templates.content: There are zero electrolytes per serving.

templates.name: How do I skip a delivery for my subscription?
templates.content: Once logged into your account, click on Delivery Schedule on the left to see all upcoming deliveries for your subscriptions. To skip a delivery you can click Skip to the right of each one.

templates.name: Are your products Kosher and if so who is the supervising agency?
templates.content: Yes, they are Parve and the supervising agency is the Orthodox Union.

templates.name: Are your products vegan?
templates.content: Yes! All of our products are vegan.

templates.name: I have kidney stones and my urologist recommended that I drink water with lemon in it every day. Does True Lemon have the same properties as lemon juice for this condition?
templates.content:
We always recommend that you speak to your healthcare provider when considering health solutions for specific conditions. While we have never run any trials to test True Lemon's effectiveness in helping to treat kidney stones, a urologist in North Carolina conducted a month-long study of some of his kidney stone patients. Half of his patients used fresh lemon and the other half used True Lemon (the doctor provided the True Lemon.) After a month, he looked at pH balance and found the results were exactly the same for both groups of patients. 

We have heard from many people who have kidney stones and have successfully incorporated True Lemon into their treatment program. Again, we always recommend discussing treatment options with your healthcare provider.

templates.name: Are your products non-GMO?
templates.content: Yes, all of the ingredients we use are non-GMO.

templates.name: Are the colors you use natural?
templates.content: We use non-GMO colors that come from only natural sources including fruits (e.g., grapes), vegetables (e.g., beets), and spices (e.g., turmeric).

templates.name: Do any of your products contain lactose?
templates.content: No, our products do not contain lactose.

templates.name: I'm on a low sodium diet. Can I use your products?
templates.content: Absolutely! Our products are a great addition to a low-sodium diet because they can flavor your food without adding any sodium. Also, adding them to water is a great alternative to soda and artificially sweetened soda and drinks which often contain sodium in them.

templates.name: How do I add a product to my subscription?
templates.content: Once logged into your account, select the Subscriptions tab, then click Add Product. This will open a pop-up where you can search, view, and select additional products to add to your upcoming deliveries. You may also choose the frequency and first shipment date.

templates.name: Can I use True Lemon as a detox drink?
templates.content: Lemons are very popular in detox programs and we know that many people use True Lemon in place of fresh lemons or lemon juice. However, we make no claims about the overall efficacy of lemon water as a detox drink nor using True Lemon as part of a detox drink.

templates.name: Do any of your spices contain wheat or rice?
templates.content: No, they don't contain either. All of our products are gluten-free.

templates.name: Are all of your ingredients sourced in the United States?
templates.content: While all of our manufacturing is done in the United States, as a global food manufacturing company, we utilize a number of sources from outside the United States to provide us with some of our raw materials. Some ingredients, like stevia, aren't yet produced in the U.S. on a large scale. Other ingredients which are made in the U.S. are very expensive vs. the same ingredient produced in countries like Mexico and Brazil. Regardless of where any of our ingredients come from, they all meet the highest standards, are non-GMO and are the best quality we can purchase.

templates.name: Do you use MSG?
templates.content: We don't use MSG in any of our products. It is not something we add nor is it in the ingredients we source.

templates.name: Does True Lemon have the same properties as a fresh lemon?
templates.content: True Lemon is made from real lemon juices and oils. True Lemon behaves almost identically to fresh lemon juice when using in water, drinks, beverages and in recipes. This is also true for True Lime, True Orange and True Grapefruit.

templates.name: Do your products have corn in them?
templates.content: Yes, our True Lemon Shaker, True Lime Shaker, True Lemon Pepper Spice Blend, True Lime Garlic & Cilantro Spice Blend, and True Orange Ginger contain non-GMO maltodextrin, a natural starch derivative of corn.

templates.name: Are your products such as the Black Cherry Limeade considered low glycemic?
templates.content: Yes, because the amount of sugar they contain is so small. This is true for all of our low-calorie, stevia-sweetened beverages.

templates.name: Do your products contain soy?
templates.content: Our products do not contain soy.

templates.name: Where does your citric acid come from?
templates.content: Citric acid is found in all citrus fruits. However, since there is not enough citrus to produce the amount of citric acid that food manufacturers like us use, our citric acid comes initially from sugar. It is fermented using a non-GMO enzyme. The non-GMO citric acid we use mimics the citric acid found in citrus fruits and is not used as an artificial preservative.

templates.name: I'm pregnant. Can I use your products?
templates.content:
Absolutely! We have a ton of delicious options for you to try! Our products are a great way to drink more water (instead of drinking artificially sweetened soda or beverages with high sugar content). They are also a great way to flavor your food without adding any sodium.

As always, if you have specific questions or concerns about any food or beverage you are eating/drinking during your pregnancy, we recommend that you speak to your physician.

templates.name: Do any of your products contain any mono-sodium glutamate and/or free glutamic acid?
templates.content: No, our products do not contain any monosodium glutamate or glutamic acid.

templates.name: Do your products contain flavonoids or Limeonene?
templates.content: Absolutely (and that's great)! Because of our gentle encapsulation, we are able to maintain the delicate flavonoids (including limonene) that are naturally found in citrus oils. Flavonoids are a group of plant metabolites thought to provide health benefits through cell signaling pathways and antioxidant effects. These molecules are found in a variety of fruits and vegetables. Limonene is found in citrus peels/rinds and is the thing that makes oranges and lemons smell orangey and lemony.

templates.name: I have diabetes. Can I use your products?
templates.content: Yes, all of our True Citrus products are a great addition to a diabetes management eating plan. However, if you have any questions or concerns about using any food or beverage, you should always consult your physician.

templates.name: How do you address pesticides that are sprayed on the fruits? Does it make its way into the oils and juices?
templates.content: The pesticides that are sprayed on citrus fruits do not enter our products. Before we encapsulate the citrus fruits' oils and juices, the citrus oils are refined and processed using state-of-the-art technology to essentially reduce any pesticide residue down to zero.

templates.name: Can I get samples?
templates.content: You order samples of True Citrus unsweetened sachets and low calorie, sweetened drink mixes here: https://www.truelemon.com/collections/sample-packs We are also happy to provide samples of our products for health clubs, healthcare professionals, health support groups, healthcare facilities, events, runs and races. For further information about sampling True Citrus products, please send us an email at customercare@truecitrus.com.

templates.name: Is True Lemon pasteurized?
templates.content: True Lemon has not been pasteurized.

templates.name: Can I order your products in bulk for a food service operation?
templates.content: Whether you are a food service or dietary manager looking for alternatives to lemon juice packets or fresh lemon wedges, or a chef interested in high quality, all-natural and cost-effective alternative to perishable lemons and limes, True Lemon and True Lime are wonderful additions to your foodservice operations. True Lemon and True Lime are available in 100, 500, 1,000 and 2,000 count packet boxes for beverage stations, patient trays, buffets and table tops. True Lemon and True Lime are also available in foodservice shakers and juice pouches for back-of-the-house and in bulk for ingredients. To find out more information about bringing True Lemon or True Lime into your foodservice operation, please email us at foodservice@truecitrus.com.

templates.name: What is your source of maltodextrin used in your shakers?
templates.content: The purpose of maltodextrin in our products is to help our flavor components disperse better when cooking, baking or seasoning. Without it, you would get big hits of lemon oil with pockets of acid instead of a homogenous product throughout. The maltodextrin we use is Non GMO and is solely derived from corn and is not used as a sweetener. Because of its low use amount, the maltodextrin does not significantly contribute to raising blood sugar.

templates.name: Are your products made with organic fruit?
templates.content: Our products are not made with organic fruit.

templates.name: Is Stevia an artificial sweetener?
templates.content:
Stevia is not artificial. It's sourced from the Stevia Rebaudiana leaf using cold water extraction methods. There's a lot of misinformation about Stevia being unhealthy, so we wrote a blog post to try to discuss this if you're interested in reading it: https://www.truelemon.com/blogs/tc/the-down-low-on-stevia-is-it-an-artificial-sweetener  Some stevia products are made from a process that uses chemicals in the extraction or refinement of their stevia which is why some people may consider those to be artificial. However, we use only Non GMO stevia that is guaranteed a minimum of 95% pure, which is some of the highest in the industry.

In addition, we source our rebiana only from reputable companies that do not use chemicals in the extraction or refinement of their stevia, and use only water-based extraction methods, which are safer for both our customers and our environment.

templates.name: Is the sugar you use chemically processed?
templates.content: The Non GMO sugar we use is refined to remove any impurities.

templates.name: Where does the caffeine come from in your Energy Drinks?/What is clean caffeine?
templates.content: Unlike many energy drinks that are currently on the market, the caffeine we use is from green tea, so it delivers a more sustained lift from a natural source.

templates.name: Where are your products made/manufactured?
templates.content: All True Citrus products are proudly made in the USA.

templates.name: I added True Lemon to water and it doesn't taste like anything.
templates.content: Our flagship product, True Lemon Crystallized Wedge sachets, is not lemonade and so it's not going to be a strong, sweet taste like lemonade. Instead, True Lemon has a refreshing, light taste, just like you squeezed a lemon wedge into your water. (Each sachet equals the taste of one wedge.) The same is true of True Lime, True Orange and True Grapefruit. If you like a stronger, sweeter taste, then can we suggest trying one of our  Drink Mixes: https://www.truelemon.com/collections/sweetened-hydration-helpers

templates.name: Is there aspartame in your products?
templates.content: None! All of our products are sweetened naturally with stevia.

templates.name: Do you use cochineal as an ingredient for your colors?
templates.content: We do not use cochineal as a color.

templates.name: How are your True Orange packets considered unsweetened when they contain sugar?
templates.content: True Orange uses a tiny amount of sugar (<0.5g/packet or 1/8 teaspoon) as a natural bulking agent and not to sweeten the product. This small amount of sugar is considered to be negligible by the FDA, and does not have any effect on blood sugar levels when used in 16 ounces of water/beverages.

templates.name: What are wedge replacements?
templates.content: Our Wedge Replacements include True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, True Grapefruit. They are crystallized citrus made from real juice and oils, and can be used to enhance the flavor of water, tea, and recipes. For example, each True Lemon crystallized packet equals the taste of one lemon wedge. They are unsweetened; 0-sugar, 0-calories, with no artificial sweeteners, flavors, colors or preservatives!

templates.name: Do your products contain caffeine?
templates.content: Yes, some of our products do contain caffeine. Our Iced Teas contain 40 mg of caffeine per stick packet, and our Energy Drink Mixes contain 120 mg of caffeine per stick packet (equal to a strong cup of coffee).

templates.name: Where is stevia grown?
templates.content: Like most stevia, ours is produced in a state-of-the-art facility in China under strict food guidelines and stringent auditing requirements and meets the highest quality standards.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $40 after discounts. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: I'm missing an item from my order
templates.content: If you are missing items, please call us toll-free at 1-844-LUV-TRUE (1-844-588-8783) or email us at customercare@truecitrus.com. We will make sure we correct your order as quickly as possible.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Once an order is placed, we're not able to make any changes. Additionally, if the order hasn't shipped yet, we can only change the shipping address. But I can check if it's still possible to cancel it for you. Could you please share the order number and the email address?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with the tracking number.

templates.name: Are the hydration kits the same formula as the single boxed types?
templates.content: The kits are multi-packs of the individual boxes which means they are same formula as individual boxes.

templates.name: What are your shipping charges?
templates.content: If you spend $15.97 or less (after any discounts have been applied) you will be subject to the regular cost of shipping as determined by UPS. If you spend $15.98 or more (after any discounts have been applied) you will receive our flat rate shipping of $4.95. Any order over $40.00 (after any discounts have been applied) will receive free shipping.

templates.name: Will the Fruit Infusions be restocked? ( Lemon Strawberry, Lemon Mint, Lemon Raspberry, Lemon Cucumber, Lime Cherry, Lime Coconut and Orange Pineapple)/ When will the water enhancers be available?
templates.content: We are very excited to tell you our Fruit Infusions are in the reimagining process! Unfortunately, all of our Infusion products inventory has been allowed to sell down for this process. They are going to be unavailable for the foreseeable future. Please click here: https://www.truelemon.com/pages/contact-us and fill out the form to be notified when they are relaunched.

templates.name: Do all of your products contain Citric Acid?
templates.content: Yes, all of our products contain Non GMO citric acid.

templates.name: What if I buy your product online and I don't like it?
templates.content: Whether you purchase a True Citrus product in the store or online, they are all backed by our 100% Happiness Guarantee (because we want you to be delighted with every True Citrus purchase).  If, for any reason, you aren't satisfied, please call us toll-free at 1-866-885-3666 or, for online orders, 1-844-LUV-TRUE (1-844-588-8783). You can also email us at customercare@truecitrus.com. We're happy to send you a refund or exchange for another True Citrus product.

templates.name: I am on dialysis and have to be careful about potassium among other things
templates.content: True Citrus products have 0 phosphorus and 0.01 milligrams of potassium (basically 0 grams).

templates.name: How long do your products last?/What is the shelf life?
templates.content:
All True Citrus products have a shelf life of two years if unopened. Once you open a packet, the shelf life is only a couple of days. The shelf life for True Lemon and True Lime Shakers or our Spice Blends is also two years unopened. Once opened, the shelf life is about six months.

Once one of our products is beyond a "best used" date, the product is still safe to use. However, the flavor will start to slowly degrade after that date.

templates.name: Why do your products cost more online than in store?
templates.content:
We are a small, growing company and do our best to keep our prices low. We sell wholesale to a variety of stores and they set their own pricing. These stores don't carry our full line of products, but you can find those on our True citrus website. Walmart, for example, is a very large corporation that does billions of dollars in sales in thousands of stores across the country. Because they offer so many different items, they are able to keep their prices low. We couldn't possibly compete with the low prices that Walmart is able to offer. 

We will offer discount codes on our web site so keep an eye out for those, they can help with the price differences. However, if you are not happy with the price you paid, you are welcome to return the product to us and we will refund the price you paid. 😊

templates.name: Is there Vitamin C in all of your products?
templates.content: No, just in our Energy line!

templates.name: How is True Lemon made?
templates.content: True Lemon is made from a patented recipe that crystallizes the lemon's oils and juices, locking in fresh-squeezed lemon taste. It's the fact that True Lemon contains both lemon oil and juice that makes it special. Most lemon replacements contain just lemon juice.

templates.name: Do you accept EBT as a form of payment?
templates.content: I'm sorry, we do not accept EBT payment for our online store at this time.

templates.name: Will you be able to honor the XX discount when the item gets restocked?
templates.content: We can usually honor discounts once they're back in stock. Just reach out to me again when it's back and I'll be happy to coordinate with my team to see what can be done.

templates.name: Do your products contain oxalate?
templates.content: Stevia does contain oxalates. Our sweetened products that contain stevia would have oxalates. The unsweetened (True Lemon, True Lime, True Orange, and True Grapefruit) products do not.

templates.name: How do I cancel a subscription?
templates.content: In order to cancel your subscription, you will first need to log in to your account. When logged into your account, select "Manage Subscriptions". Next to each of your product subscriptions is a "Cancel" button. To cancel your subscription, click "Cancel".

templates.name: Tracking Info - brand specific
templates.content: You will receive a shipping confirmation email with the tracking number when your order has shipped. Please check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there. You can also log into your account: https://truecitrus.attn.tv/amvCoe8UKmzb as a returning customer. Click on "My Account," "View Past Orders" and scroll to the order. It will read "Shipped" underneath the status heading. Please note that the tracking number will not be active until the end of the day.
